summary: BUG-016 — gate showDeckRewardPopup behind auth (await getCurrentUser, skip if null) and defer to after renderDailyDetails via setTimeout 300ms. Anonymous users no longer see deck unlock popups; authenticated users see them after the result UI has painted. trackDailyStreakIncremented analytics still fire for anonymous users. Issue 3 (poster deck mismatch) partially mitigated as side effect; structural repaint fix still pending in Backlog.
